command.biome-snapshot.start: The game has been paused. Biome screenshot is being generated. Please wait a moment...
command.biome-snapshot.fail: The screenshot of the biome failed to save
command.biome-snapshot.config.biome_colo: [biome] The color of %s has been set to %s (0x%s)
[biome] The color of %s has been removed
command.biome-snapshot.config.mainland_o: [mainland_ocean_biome] The color of mainland has been set to %s (0x%s)
[mainland_ocean_biome] The color of ocean has been set to %s (0x%s)
command.biome-snapshot.config.mainland_r: [mainland_river_ocean_biome] The color of mainland has been set to %s (0x%s)
[mainland_river_ocean_biome] The color of river has been set to %s (0x%s)
[mainland_river_ocean_biome] The color of ocean has been set to %s (0x%s)
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.biome-sna: This mod provides some commands to export the biome or terrain status of a specified coordinate range as a flat map (requires permission level of 4).
